import React from "react"; import { Trash, Eye, Book } from "react-bootstrap-icons"; import { Card, Button, Container, Row, Col } from "react-bootstrap"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function Deck({ props }) { const decks = props.map((item, index) => { return (
  • {item.name}

    {item.id} cards

         {item.description}
    • ); }); console.log(decks) return (
      {decks}
    ) } export default Deck;
